citation.sourceDocument: Idaho State Tax Commission, 5.3% flat tax on Idaho taxable income (HB 40, 2025)
citation.sourceNote: Idaho conforms to the federal standard deduction. The rate schedule's small 0% floor on the first ~$4,811 (single) / ~$9,622 (MFJ) of taxable income is omitted, so the figure errs slightly high (the conservative side for setting money aside); the 2026 floor is not yet published.
